description: The portable label taxonomy (see workflow/naming-conventions.md). level + type + priority are flat string labels; state is canonical on the Project Status field, mirrored by the status:* routing index (dual-write — see onboarding/board-label-sync.md). seat:* lane labels are created per chosen seat by bootstrap.sh.

labels.name: level:epic
labels.description: shippable capability; the unit of steering

labels.name: level:story
labels.description: one outcome; fits a PR; flows the 7 states

labels.name: status:delivered
labels.description: Routing index: PR open, awaiting QA

labels.name: status:tested
labels.description: Routing index: QA PASS, awaiting SM merge

standing_epics.title: Epic: Maintenance & Tech Debt
standing_epics.body: Standing epic. Parents chores, refactors, dep bumps, CI work that isn't part of a feature epic. See workflow/hierarchy.md.

standing_epics.title: Epic: Operations & Incidents
standing_epics.body: Standing epic. Parents hotfixes, P0 reactive work, ops. A bug with no clear feature epic homes here. See workflow/hierarchy.md.

standing_epics.title: Epic: Quality & Evals
standing_epics.body: Standing epic. Parents the assurance/eval backlog owned by the Quality seat. See workflow/hierarchy.md.

standing_epics.title: Epic: Discovery & Spikes
standing_epics.body: Standing epic. Parents time-boxed research/investigation spikes. See workflow/hierarchy.md.
